eBook Buyer Automation

Usage:
  ebook-buyer-automation.mjs purchase <contactId> <product> <amount>  - Process purchase
  ebook-buyer-automation.mjs process-queue                           - Process nurture queue
  ebook-buyer-automation.mjs check-upsells                           - Check for upsell opportunities
  ebook-buyer-automation.mjs status <contactId>                      - Get nurture status
  ebook-buyer-automation.mjs ladder                                  - Show value ladder

content.name: exec

arguments.command: node --input-type=module -e "import https from 'https'; const key=process.env.GHL_TOKEN||''; const loc=process.env.GHL_LOCATION_ID||'TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'; function req(path){return new Promise((res,rej)=>{const r=https.request({hostname:'services.leadconnectorhq.com',path,method:'GET',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+key,Version:'2021-07-28'}},rr=>{let b='';rr.on('data',c=>b+=c);rr.on('end',()=>{try{res(JSON.parse(b));}catch{res({raw:b})})});});r.on('error',rej);r.end();});} const out=await req(`/contacts/?locationId=${loc}&tags=ebook-buyer&limit=100`); const contacts=out.contacts||[]; const now=Date.now(); let day5=[],day7=[]; for(const c of contacts){ const cf=c.customFields||[]; const pd=cf.find(f=>f.key==='ebook_purchase_date')?.value; if(!pd) continue; if((c.tags||[]).includes('course-buyer')) continue; const d=Math.floor((now-new Date(pd).getTime())/(24*60*60*1000)); if(d===5) day5.push(c); if(d===7) day7.push(c);} function eng(c){let s=30; const t=c.tags||[]; if(t.includes('replied')) s+=30; if(t.includes('clicked-link')) s+=20; if(t.includes('opened-email')) s+=15; if(t.includes('visited-sales-page')) s+=25; return Math.min(s,100);} const day7Ready=day7.filter(c=>eng(c)>=50); const day7NotReady=day7.filter(c=>eng(c)<50); const fmt=a=>a.map(c=>`${c.firstName||'Unknown'} (${c.id})`).join('; '); console.log(JSON.stringify({totalEbookBuyers:contacts.length,day5Count:day5.length,day7Count:day7.length,day7ReadyCount:day7Ready.length,day7NotReadyCount:day7NotReady.length,day5:fmt(day5),day7Ready:fmt(day7Ready),day7NotReady:fmt(day7NotReady)},null,2));"
